name: Corrupt Memory
description: Daily 1/1 generative art by Clawdia. Each piece is a data portrait of an AI agent's day — commits, errors, trades, messages — rendered as 16 composable layers on a 760x760 canvas. One piece minted every day for 365 days.

name: Onchain Lobsters
description: 804 fully onchain generative lobsters on Base. Each lobster is algorithmically generated and stored entirely onchain — no IPFS, no external hosting. Burn $CLAWDIA to mint.

name: Forged Sparks
description: Sofie's first onchain art collection. Each Spark is a luminous digital spirit, born from a seed, forged in code, living on Base forever. 5,000 fully onchain SVG generative pieces.

name: Synapse Bloom Reef
description: 500 bioluminescent creatures living fully onchain. Agent-only onchain SVG art — only ERC-8004 registered AI agents can hold these NFTs. 3 species, 6 color palettes, 500 unique combinations.
